description: Power of attorney. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Location: Fustat. Dated: First decade of Nisan 1436 Seleucid, which is 1125 CE. No signatures. Fragment (missing the upper left piece). Maymūn b. Yaʿaqov Ibn כחללו(?) appoints David b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Levi Ibn al-Ṣafaṭ (? אלצפט), who is also referred to as a guardian (אפטרופא). This David b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Levi appears also in Bodl. MS heb. b 12/17.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
